title: Observation (v2, multi-agent extension)
description: v2 extension of v1 Observation. Adds source_agent_id and input_provenance_chain for multi-agent topology support. All v1 fields and invariants are preserved.
$comment: Extends v1 Observation. New fields supply agent-boundary provenance required by Invariants 3 (Evidence-First) and 4 (Reconstructability).

source_agent_id.description: Net-new in v2. References AgentIdentity.agent_id of the producing agent. Required. Governance rationale: Invariant 3 (Evidence-First) requires every Observation to trace to a registered source.

input_provenance_chain.description: Net-new in v2. Ordered list of agent_id values representing the upstream provenance chain for this Observation. Empty list indicates human-sourced input. Required. Governance rationale: Invariant 3 requires the chain be complete before Decision presentation. Invariant 4 requires ledger-alone reconstruction of every boundary crossing.
